description: Product DescriptionMade of high density Polyester 600D with 210D inner lining for durability and easy maintenanceNylon bonded thread for longer lifeBranded zippers and sliders for easy use and durabilityPrinted facade for added styleInner compartment with padded casing for lap-top with zippered opening on the sideFront compartment with zipper concealed under flapSmall utility pocket on the front with graphicCurved padded, adjustable single shoulder strap that crosses the torso diagonally with zippered pocket on the strap for emergency suppliesMeshed back for brethabilityWaist harness for carrying the bag more comfortablyBar tacked on specialized machines for increased durabilityWarranty: 5 yearsCapacity10 litresMeasurementHeight: 18 inchesWidth: 12 inchesDepth: 3.5 inchesWash careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
